workflow.title: Workflows
workflow.empty: No workflows yet. Add one to run automation when a trigger fires.
workflow.activity.empty: No activities yet — add at least one for the workflow to do anything.
workflow.activity.unknownKind.noEditor: This activity has no editor — it will be sent to the server as-is.
workflow.activity.incompatible: Incompatible: the item type reaching this step isn't accepted. Add a transform before it.
workflow.activity.skipOnItemError: Skip items that fail (instead of aborting the run)
workflow.field.name: Name
workflow.create.title: Add workflow
workflow.edit.title: Edit workflow
workflow.trigger.subscriptionUpdated.sub: Pick specific subscriptions. Leave empty to match all (subject to the kinds filter below).
workflow.trigger.subscriptionUpdated.kin: Pick subscription kinds. Leave empty to match all (subject to the subscriptions filter above).
workflow.activity.subscriptionItemTitleC: One per line (or comma-separated). Case-insensitive. Item matches if ANY keyword appears in its title.
workflow.runs.title: Run history
workflow.activity.exhentaiQueryToGallery: No options — searches ExHentai and takes the first gallery.
workflow.activity.aiTransform.targetItem: Pick the type this transform should produce. Leave on "auto-detect" to inherit the next activity's required type.
workflow.activity.aiTransform.extraInstr: Appended to the LLM's system prompt. Use this to describe the source's meaning or constrain the output beyond the schema.
workflow.activity.aiTransform.summary.ta: auto-detect target type from next step
workflow.activity.picker.title: Add activity
workflow.activity.picker.searchPlacehold: Filter by name, kind, or group…
workflow.activity.picker.empty: No activities accept the item type at this position.
workflow.activity.picker.needsBridge.des: Adding this will also insert an AI transform node right before it, configured to produce the type this activity needs.
workflow.trigger.downloaderCompleted.thi: Only fire when the completed task belongs to one of the picked sources. Leave empty to match every source.
workflow.activity.createNotification.tit: Required. Use {{fieldName}} to interpolate item fields (e.g. "Downloaded {{name}}").
workflow.activity.createNotification.sum: Empty title — configure one to enable saving.
